channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
Of course, this raises serious questions around trust.
The interesting part:
→ Inaudible watermark...
item.description:
Of course, this raises serious questions around trust.
The interesting part:
→ Inaudible watermarking is being built in → Open models like Chatterbox Turbo from Resemble AI are pushing innovation forward
We’re entering an era where voice is both a UX layer and a security challenge.
If you’re building products, this isn’t optional to understand.
Don't miss out on the latest AI advancements! Sign up here to stay informed! https://t.co/HSGEBrANtX
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 5
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
But realism isn’t just about sounding right.
It’s about feeling right.
New systems introduce:
→ E...
item.description:
But realism isn’t just about sounding right.
It’s about feeling right.
New systems introduce:
→ Expressive control, calm, neutral, dramatic delivery → Paralinguistic prompts like [laugh], [sigh], [gasp] → Real-time performance for assistants, games, interactive media
We’re moving from synthetic voices to performative AI.
That’s a very different category.
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 4
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
An AI can now clone your voice from just 5 seconds of audio.
Not minutes. Not hours. Seconds.
This...
item.description:
An AI can now clone your voice from just 5 seconds of audio.
Not minutes. Not hours. Seconds.
This changes everything, from customer experience to identity risk.
And most people are still thinking in “text-to-speech.”
@resembleai is pushing this forward.
Here’s what’s actually happening under the hood…
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 6
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
手绘的关键是信息简化能力。它看似复杂，却能将现实抽象成少数的几笔，进行概括式的描述。
从这一点来说，人在其中做的那些东西是确定哪些东西要画出来，并去除那些不用画的元素。这才是最值钱的。
这个思路是...
item.description:
手绘的关键是信息简化能力。它看似复杂，却能将现实抽象成少数的几笔，进行概括式的描述。
从这一点来说，人在其中做的那些东西是确定哪些东西要画出来，并去除那些不用画的元素。这才是最值钱的。
这个思路是不是也可以延伸到产品和构建人类与 AI 的护城河方面呢？ https://t.co/c7q3Bo7GTT
--- @bearliu | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 183
item.author: @bearliu

item.title: 有没有朋友分享下 deepseek v4 实际体验感受？正在考虑要不要以 API 形式接入到 wanman
item.author: @turingou

item.title:
Built with your feedback.
This week: 169 feedback was handled; 40+ updates delivered.
What's new:...
item.description:
Built with your feedback.
This week: 169 feedback was handled; 40+ updates delivered.
What's new: ✅ The Markets page now shows coin icons across all listings — cleaner, faster to scan ✅ Third-party keyboards now supported in Square & Market search on iOS ✅ Grid trading strategy IDs now clearly displayed — easier order tracking for traders
Drop your next idea 👇 https://t.co/gtKx0LwmyU
We might ship it next. #ProductFeedback
--- @binance | ❤️ 118 | 🔁 23 | 💬 52 | 👁 11350
item.author: @binance
